_comment: Isaac Lab-Arena eval jobs config for the fine-tuned Trossen DreamZero LoRA.
Uses our custom 'trossen_pick_and_place' environment (raised work table so objects are in the
tall Trossen mobile robot's reach) + the 'trossen_mobile_ai' embodiment. Run via
Tune table pose with WAM_TABLE_X/Y/Z env; camera aim is in the embodiment (trossen.py).

jobs.name: trossen_pnp_dreamzero_yellow_pickplace
jobs.language_instruction: pick up the yellow cylindrical object and place it in the blue tray
